title: Williams Investor Relations
note: Primary investor-relations portal for company disclosures, financial materials, and news releases.

title: Williams 2024 Annual Report
note: Primary filing-style source for Williams' business segments, assets, risks, and financial performance.

title: Williams February 2026 Financial Supplement
note: Company financial supplement with 2024 and 2025 net income, modified EBITDA, and adjusted EBITDA data.

title: Transco
note: Williams product and operations page for the Transco natural gas pipeline system.

title: Williams Companies Market Capitalization
note: Market-cap reference URL supplied by the manifest and used for public valuation context.

title: The Williams Companies Stock Price & Overview
note: Public market-data source for WMB market capitalization and P/E ratio around the review date.

title: REopt
note: Open-source distributed energy planning and optimization tool relevant to microgrid and local energy alternatives.

title: OpenEMS - Open Source Energy Management System
note: Open-source energy management platform for integrating storage, renewables, EV charging, heat pumps, and other distributed assets.

title: OpenEnergyMonitor GitHub
note: Open-source energy monitoring tools used as an enabling layer for verified local energy demand and flexibility.
